description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a modern, urban appearance. She has a short, straight bob hairstyle and is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted top with a floral pattern and a short, pleated skirt. Her arms are extended horizontally, and she is wearing closed-toe, low-heeled shoes. The figure's facial features are defined, and her posture is upright and balanced. The overall look suggests a casual yet stylish city dweller, suitable for a variety of urban environments.
description: A stylish adult woman with a short bob haircut, wearing a sleeveless floral top, pleated skirt, and low-heeled shoes, standing upright with arms extended.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, floral top, pleated skirt, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the skirt and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the sleeveless top, and the pleated skirt.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the side contour of the skirt and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and short pleated skirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
